mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `order` WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()) AS todayOrders, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM `order` WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND pay_status = 1) AS todayRevenue, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `user` WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()) AS newUsers, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product WHERE status = 1) AS totalProducts

SELECT DATE(create_time) AS date, COUNT(*) AS count, IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) AS amount FROM `order` WHERE pay_status = 1 AND create_time BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date

SELECT MONTH(create_time) AS month, COUNT(*) AS count, IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) AS amount FROM `order` WHERE pay_status = 1 AND YEAR(create_time) = #{year} GROUP BY MONTH(create_time) ORDER BY month
SELECT DATE(create_time) AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM `user` WHERE create_time BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date
SELECT MONTH(create_time) AS month, IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) AS amount FROM `order` WHERE pay_status = 1 AND YEAR(create_time) = #{year} GROUP BY MONTH(create_time) ORDER BY month
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `order` WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM `order` WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND pay_status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `user` WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product WHERE status = 1

SELECT (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM `order` WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND pay_status = 1) AS todayRevenue, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `order` WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND pay_status = 1) AS validOrders, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `order` WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()) AS totalOrders, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `order` WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND pay_status = 0) AS unpaidOrders, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `order` WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() AND pay_status = 1) AS paidOrders, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product WHERE status = 1) AS onShelf, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product WHERE status = 0) AS offShelf
SELECT name, sales FROM product WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY sales DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS month, IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) AS amount FROM `order` WHERE pay_status = 1 GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month
